reviews.review_description:
i have this game in rift works great   bought it for my quest 2  the aim when you shoottomatos is way off   in all other games aim is perfect what to do? tried to reinstall no good 
thanks Lynnieb

developer_response.body: Hey. Thanks for reporting this, there was indeed a bug. I've now patched it and pushed a new update. The aiming is all fixed now on Quest 2! :)
